keywords.name: I am Abran Ironeye.
keywords.job: I am a busy man. I run the Ironhouse.
keywords.ironhouse: What do you think? Here weapons and armor are forged, repaired, and sold.
keywords.time: You should know that on your own!
keywords.king: I would like to see a true warrior-king in Thais... like in the old days. But who knows, perhaps one day the tides of fate will bring such a man to power. Who knows...
keywords.tibianus: I would like to see a true warrior-king in Thais... like in the old days. But who knows, perhaps one day the tides of fate will bring such a man to power. Who knows...
keywords.army: Such a great tool wasted for garrison duties, a shame.
keywords.ferumbras: Quite a challenge, but his bets for power were made without the finesse of a true warrior.
keywords.finesse: I won't give away my tricks, learn your own.
keywords.excalibug: If someone would bring me that weapon I could reshape the realm... and reward this hero beyond his dreams.
keywords.ironeye: I don't care if you like it or not. Stop staring at it!
keywords.teddy: I don't know anything about a teddy... and if you are smart you shouldn't either...
keywords.thais: Thais has outlived its usefulness since years. Its star is sinking.
keywords.tibia: The world is ready for a significant change.
keywords.warehouse: My Ironhouse is more than a warehouse.
keywords.carlin: Their independence is a proof for the weakness of Thais.
keywords.news: In Venore nothing comes for free and you could not afford my 'news'.
keywords.tax: The taxing keeps the Thaian kingdom alive, but it also might break its neck one day.
keywords.banor: As a man that grows up needs no mommy, a warrior has to outgrow his need for gods.
keywords.gambling: I trust only in skill, not luck.

texts: I am a busy man. I run the Ironhouse.
